description:
The Next-Gen Collaboration Suite

Lark is a next-generation office suite that integrates messaging, schedule management, collaborative documents, video conferencing, and many more applications in a single platform.
Settings
- When you adjust the text size in the General settings of the Lark mobile app, the text size across all pages such as chats, Docs, Sheets, Base, web pages, mini-programs, Calendar, Meetings, and emails opened in the mobile app will update simultaneously. This ensures a more consistent appearance and a more comfortable reading experience.
